title: Input and Output
description: Read user input and convert between types.
objectives: Convert strings to numbers with int() and float()
recap: input() reads text from the user (always as a string), and you can convert it with int() or float(). f-strings make formatting output easy.
practicePrompts: Ask the user for their birth year and print how old they are.
Can you format a price to always show exactly 2 decimal places?
